## Description

Provide a summary of the changes and the motivation/context behind them.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated to verify the changes
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` is not modified without explicit architecture justification
- [ ] No hardcoded configuration, provider, or model values introduced
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, CLI status, or inline docs as appropriate)
